description:
Create five tiddlers tagged 'Sprint-Tasks' with custom fields 'priority', 'assignee', 'status', and 'due-date' for the following tasks:
- 'Migrate Database to PostgreSQL 16' (priority: high, assignee: Sarah Chen, status: open, due-date: 2025-02-15)
- 'Update API Documentation' (priority: medium, assignee: Marcus Rivera, status: in-progress, due-date: 2025-02-20)
- 'Fix Authentication Timeout Bug' (priority: high, assignee: Sarah Chen, status: open, due-date: 2025-02-10)
- 'Design New Dashboard Mockups' (priority: low, assignee: Aisha Patel, status: done, due-date: 2025-01-30)
- 'Set Up CI-CD Pipeline for Staging' (priority: medium, assignee: James O'Brien, status: open, due-date: 2025-02-18)

Additionally, create a 'Sprint Board' tiddler tagged 'Sprint-Tasks' containing an 'Open Tasks' heading with a <$list> widget filtering by status[open] and a 'High Priority' heading with a <$list> widget filtering by priority[high].

expected_tasks.title: Set Up CI-CD Pipeline for Staging
